product_updates.title: Alibaba’s Qwen tech lead steps down after major AI push
product_updates.content: Reactions rippled through Alibaba's Qwen team after tech lead Junyang Lin stepped down following a major model launch.

product_updates.title: AI companies are spending millions to thwart this former tech exec’s congressional bid
product_updates.content: A tech billionaire-backed super PAC is spending $125 million to undercut candidates pushing for AI regulation. New York's Alex Bores, a former tech executive himself, is one of them.

product_updates.title: ChatGPT’s new GPT-5.3 Instant model will stop telling you to calm down
product_updates.content: The company says the new model will reduce the "cringe" that's been annoying its users for months.

product_updates.title: Claude Code rolls out a voice mode capability
product_updates.content: Anthropic is stepping up its game in the AI coding space with the rollout of Voice Mode in Claude Code.

product_updates.title: X says it will suspend creators from revenue-sharing program for unlabeled AI posts of ‘armed conflict’
product_updates.content: Creators who break the rules will get a three-month suspension, and if they continue to violate the policy, they'll be permanently banned.

product_updates.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
product_updates.content: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

product_updates.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
product_updates.content: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Downdetector, Speedtest sold to IT service provider Accenture in $1.2B deal
technical_breakthroughs.content: Accenture plans to buy Ookla, which also includes RootMetrics and Ekahau.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
technical_breakthroughs.content: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: The startup that says it can stop lightning, and inside OpenAI’s Pentagon deal
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: LLMs can unmask pseudonymous users at scale with surprising accuracy
technical_breakthroughs.content: Pseudonymity has never been perfect for preserving privacy. Soon it may be pointless.

technical_breakthroughs.title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires
technical_breakthroughs.content: On June 1, 2023, as a sweltering heat wave baked Quebec, thousands of lightning strikes flashed across the province, setting off more than 120 wildfires. The blazes ripped through parched forests and withered grasslands, burned for weeks, and compounded what was rapidly turning into Canada’s wors…
